  'headline': 'Should Benchmark’s Nvidia-Linked Rating Rationale Reframe How '

  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'Earlier this week, Benchmark reiterated its positive analyst '

 {'date': '2026-02-02 17:35:51',
  'headline': 'Insider-Favored Growth Companies To Watch February 2026',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'As February trading kicks off, major U.S. stock indexes have '

 {'date': '2026-01-02 17:35:33',
  'headline': 'Insider Picks For High Growth In January 2026',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'As the U.S. markets kick off 2026 with a mixed start following a '

  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/insider-picks-high-growth-january-173533595.html'},
 {'date': '2025-12-04 17:36:03',
  'headline': '3 Growth Companies Insiders Are Betting On',

  'summary': 'As the Dow Jones and S&P 500 approach record highs, investors '
